case_title: LILIANA MARTINEZ ET AL VS. ALICE CARUTHERS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARUTHERS, ALICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-12-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS PRESENT ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, LILIANA GORIN, SASHA MARTINEZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT CARUTHERS, ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/24/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, LILIANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO LILIANA MARTINEZ ON 4/3/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL; NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, LILIANA GORIN, SASHA MARTINEZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT CARUTHERS, ALICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-03-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 6/12/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NO SUCH STREET-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
